title: Seasonals
description: Adds seasonal themed foods to Team Abnormals' Neapolitan mod.
body:
**This mod is an addon to Team Abnormal's Neapolitan mod. It requires both [Neapolitan](https://modrinth.com/mod/neapolitan) and [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint).**

📋About this mod:
-----------------

Seasonals adds new Flavors to the Neapolitan mod, which are all seasonal themed. Similar to Neapolitan each Flavor has an ice cream, an ice cream block, a milkshake and a special potion effect. In addition seasonals also adds several other food items related to the added Flavors.

🍦Mod Content:
--------------

Pumkin Flavor Food

*   Effect: Stuffed \[Hunger and Saturation fills up and the player heals due to natural regeneration. Once the effect ends the player looses all hunger and saturation rapidly. While the effect is active, no food can be consumed.\]
*   Pumpkin Puree
*   Pumpkin Ice Cream
*   Pumpkin Ice Cream Block
*   Pumpkin Milkshake \[**Only in version 4.1.0:** Changes the duration of all active effects depending on it's previous duration\]
*   Pumpkin Cake
*   Pumpkin Cake Slice \[Only if [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) is loaded\]
*   Chocolate Pumpkin Muffin
*   Pumpkin Adzuki Stew

Sweet Berry Flavor Food

*   Effect: Thorn Resistance \[Prevents Damage from prickly Blocks and the Thorns Enchantment\]
*   Sweet Berry Ice Cream
*   Sweet Berry Ice Cream Block
*   Sweet Berry Milkshake \[**Only in version 4.1.0:** Changes the level of active effects to a random value between 1 and 3\]
*   Sweet Berry Cake
*   Sweet Berry Cake Slice \[Only if [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) is loaded\]
*   Glazed Sweet Berries
*   Sweet Berry Vanilla Yogurt
*   Mixed Berry Muffin

Beetroot Flavor Food

*   Effect: Rooted \[Gives 100% Knockback Resistance and a few armor points, but prevents jumping\]
*   Beetroot Ice Cream
*   Beetroot Ice Cream Block
*   Beetroot Milkshake \[**Only in version 4.1.0:** Removes effects of the nearest hostile mob\]
*   Beetroot Cake
*   Beetroot Cake Slice \[Only if [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) is loaded\]
*   Roasted Beetroot
*   Oxidized Beetroot \[Gives Rooted, Resistance and Slowness. Crafted with Oxidized Copper or found underwater\]
*   Red Velvet Cupcake

Other Food

*   Rabbit Roast
*   Banana Split Sundae
